TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mark Alarie == 12 bulad 11 demiad, 1963 a mihca, Mark Alarie, miunduay. Mark Alarie nalecuhan i Phoenix, Arizona, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Mark Alarie unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Mark Alarie i 1986 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Denver Nuggets putiput. kakuniza
S.PHON: == mark ar~…æari…ô == ** bur~…æad ** d…ômiad, **** a miƒß ¶a, mark ar~…æari…ô, miunduaj. mark ar~…æari…ô nar~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i pƒßo…ôni*, arizona, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, paƒßanƒßanan tu kawaw ajza. mark ar~…æari…ô unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…æi miunduaj nu amir~…æika nba nisakaput, u tabakiaj ajawaj mimar~…æiaj. mark ar~…æari…ô i **** a miƒß ¶an nba sapapir~…æi î~ ° mimar~…æiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…æsir~…æ **, namapir~…æi î~ ° tu nu d…ôn*…ôr nugg…ôts putiput. kakuniza
S.FORM: == Mark Alarie == 12 bulad 11 demiad, 1963 a mihca, Mark Alarie, miunduay. Mark Alarie nalecuhan i Phoenix, Arizona, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Mark Alarie unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u tabakiay ayaway mimaliay. Mark Alarie i 1986 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Denver Nuggets putiput. kakuniza
